testcase.name: refreshTokenSuccessfully
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: loginWithInvalidPasswordFails
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-10T17:34:18.646+05:30 DEBUG 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.service.impl.AuthServiceImpl : Processing registration request for email [invalid-password1@test.com] 2026-06-10T17:34:18.711+05:30 INFO 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.service.impl.AuthServiceImpl : Successfully registered new user with id [a20ce272-98b4-4d3d-bffe-cf2dd3c0e305] 2026-06-10T17:34:18.721+05:30 DEBUG 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.service.impl.AuthServiceImpl : Processing login request for email [invalid-password1@test.com] 2026-06-10T17:34:18.787+05:30 WARN 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.service.impl.AuthServiceImpl : Login failed: invalid password for email [invalid-password1@test.com] 2026-06-10T17:34:18.793+05:30 WARN 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Invalid credentials on request [/api/v1/auth/login]: Invalid email or password

testcase.name: registerDuplicateUserFails
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-10T17:34:18.806+05:30 DEBUG 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.service.impl.AuthServiceImpl : Processing registration request for email [duplicate3@test.com] 2026-06-10T17:34:18.872+05:30 INFO 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.service.impl.AuthServiceImpl : Successfully registered new user with id [f6212d43-ab2b-41a2-84ab-febd3e312a74] 2026-06-10T17:34:18.883+05:30 DEBUG 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.service.impl.AuthServiceImpl : Processing registration request for email [duplicate3@test.com] 2026-06-10T17:34:18.886+05:30 WARN 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.service.impl.AuthServiceImpl : Registration failed: email [duplicate3@test.com] is already in use 2026-06-10T17:34:18.888+05:30 WARN 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : User already exists on request [/api/v1/auth/register]: A user with the provided email already exists

testcase.name: logoutSuccessfully

testcase.name: refreshTokenFailsAfterLogout
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-10T17:34:19.539+05:30 DEBUG 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.service.impl.AuthServiceImpl : Processing registration request for email [logout-refresh1@test.com] 2026-06-10T17:34:19.615+05:30 DEBUG 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.service.impl.AuthServiceImpl : Processing login request for email [logout-refresh1@test.com] 2026-06-10T17:34:19.679+05:30 DEBUG 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.service.impl.AuthServiceImpl : User [logout-refresh1@test.com] passed status check with status [PENDING_VERIFICATION] 2026-06-10T17:34:19.680+05:30 DEBUG 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.service.jwt.JwtService : Generating access token for subject [logout-refresh1@test.com] 2026-06-10T17:34:19.680+05:30 DEBUG 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.service.jwt.JwtService : Generating refresh token for subject [logout-refresh1@test.com] 2026-06-10T17:34:19.681+05:30 INFO 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.service.impl.AuthServiceImpl : Successfully authenticated user with id [f236d486-ebb3-47e6-a172-5d1244df45ce] 2026-06-10T17:34:19.691+05:30 DEBUG 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.service.impl.AuthServiceImpl : Processing logout request 2026-06-10T17:34:19.697+05:30 INFO 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.service.impl.AuthServiceImpl : Successfully revoked refresh token for user [logout-refresh1@test.com] 2026-06-10T17:34:19.705+05:30 DEBUG 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.service.impl.AuthServiceImpl : Processing refresh token request 2026-06-10T17:34:19.706+05:30 DEBUG 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.service.jwt.JwtService : Token successfully validated for subject [logout-refresh1@test.com] 2026-06-10T17:34:19.709+05:30 WARN 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.service.impl.AuthServiceImpl : Refresh failed: token not found or revoked 2026-06-10T17:34:19.712+05:30 WARN 24144 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.j.c.a.a.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Invalid refresh token on request [/api/v1/auth/refresh]: Refresh token is invalid or revoked
